lorebook.name: The Red Planet
lorebook.description: Glimpse World lorebook for The Red Planet — part of The Endless

entries.name: [Location] Glimpse World — The Red Planet
entries.content: The Red Planet is a Glimpse World accessible through doors of The Endless. It is a barren landscape of rust-red terrain under a sky too dark to be daytime and too light to be night. The atmosphere is breathable but thin — enough to survive, not enough to feel comfortable. In the center of the only explored region sits a perfect circle of white buildings, low and featureless, arranged with a precision that does not feel accidental. The buildings have no doors, no windows, no markings of any kind on their exterior. The interior of each building is identical: a single empty room with smooth white walls and a floor that is slightly warmer than it should be. There are no other signs of habitation anywhere on the planet's visible surface. No bones, no vehicles, no infrastructure, no indication of what the buildings were for or who made them. The circle is the only thing here. Whatever it was for, it either finished or was abandoned before it could.
